<!-- Pengu's Pixel Profile README -->

<h1 align="center">🐧 Pengu's Pixel Profile</h1>

<p align="center">
  <em>A retro-styled pixel art profile page</em>
</p>

<br/>

<div align="center">
  <img src="data:image/svg+xml;base64," width="120" alt="Pixel Penguin" />
</div>

<br/>

## About
I am a German student who codes for fun. This is my retro-styled pixel art profile page featuring:

- 🐧 Pixel art design with scanlines and CRT effects
- ❄️ Animated pixel snow effect
- 🎮 Retro gaming aesthetic
- 💻 Programming language showcases

## View Live Page

<p align="center">
  <strong>Click below to view the embedded pixel profile:</strong>
</p>

<p align="center">
  <iframe
    src="./index.html"
    width="100%"
    height="700"
    style="border:none; max-width:1000px; box-shadow:0 0 20px rgba(0,0,0,0.6); border-radius:8px;"
  >
  </iframe>
</p>

<br/>

<p align="center">
  <a href="./index.html"><strong>VIEW FULL PAGE</strong></a>
</p>

<br/>

## Tech Stack
- HTML5
- CSS3 (with pixel-perfect styling)
- JavaScript (for animations)
- Responsive design
